overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine 5 scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountain valley during golden hour. Dramatic sunlight breaks through clouds illuminating a distant snow-capped peak while birds occasionally fly across the expansive sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain range
another group of birds passes overhead near the sunlit clouds

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on the cliff edge, gazing out at the mountain vista with subtle cloak movement in the breeze

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit illuminated by golden sunlight breaking through clouds
rolling mountain ridges extending into the hazy distance
rocky mountain formations framing the right side of the valley
calm water body nestled in the valley below reflecting the warm sky
rocky stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the steep drop
vertical wooden beam or trail marker at the left edge of the cliff
dense dark green tree cover filling the valley floor between the mountains

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot shows a hooded figure standing on a rocky cliff overlooking a vast mountain valley during golden hour. The snow-capped central peak glows with dramatic backlighting as clouds drift overhead, while birds occasionally fly across the expansive sky. The scene emphasizes the scale and serenity of the natural landscape with no other characters or movement except subtle environmental effects.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a serene, static vista of a hooded figure overlooking a vast mountain valley during the golden hour. It begins with a wide cinematic view of the figure standing atop a rocky cliff, emphasizing the immense scale of the surrounding natural landscape. As the camera lingers, dramatic backlighting causes the distant snow-capped central peak to glow intensely against a backdrop of drifting clouds. The scene then settles into a state of quiet majesty, with birds occasionally gliding across the expansive sky to add a sense of life to the stillness.
